sentences.target: On se retrouve au bar ce soir.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ sə ʁətʁuv o baʁ sə swaʁ/

translations.fr: On se retrouve au bar ce soir.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ sə ʁətʁuv o baʁ sə swaʁ/
translations.en: We’re meeting at the bar tonight.
translations.es: Nos vemos en el bar esta noche.
translations.de: Wir treffen uns heute Abend in der Bar.
translations.pt: Nos vemos no bar hoje à noite.
translations.vi: Tối nay chúng ta gặp nhau ở quán bar.
translations.nl: We spreken vanavond af in de bar.
translations.hi: आज रात हम बार में मिल रहे हैं।
translations.pl: Spotykamy się dziś wieczorem w barze.
translations.nb: Vi møtes på baren i kveld.
translations.id: Kita bertemu di bar malam ini.
translations.sv: Vi ses på baren i kväll.
translations.cs: Sejdeme se dnes večer v baru.
translations.da: Vi mødes på baren i aften.

tokens.explanation: Indefinite subject pronoun; in everyday French often means ‘we’. Triggers 3rd person singular agreement.
Clitic reflexive/reciprocal pronoun preceding the verb; part of the pronominal verb ‘se retrouver’, marking a reciprocal action.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; with ‘se’ forms ‘se retrouver’ = ‘to meet (each other)/to get together’.
Preposition ‘à’ contracted with the masculine definite article ‘le’ (‘à + le’ → ‘au’); introduces a locative prepositional phrase.
Common masculine noun; head of the PP complement to ‘à’, indicating the place.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies ‘soir’ to form the temporal NP ‘ce soir’.
Common noun; with ‘ce’ forms a time expression functioning as a temporal adverbial (‘this evening/tonight’).

sentences.target: Je travaille au bar le week-end.

translations.fr: Je travaille au bar le week-end.
translations.en: I work at the bar on weekends.
translations.es: Trabajo en el bar los fines de semana.
translations.de: Ich arbeite am Wochenende in der Bar.
translations.it: Lavoro al bar nei fine settimana.
translations.ru: Я по выходным работаю в баре.
translations.pt: Eu trabalho no bar nos fins de semana.
translations.vi: Cuối tuần tôi làm việc ở quán bar.
translations.ar: أعمل في الحانة في عطلات نهاية الأسبوع.
translations.nl: Ik werk in de bar in het weekend.
translations.uk: Я працюю в барі на вихідних.
translations.hi: मैं सप्ताहांत में बार में काम करता हूँ।
translations.nb: Jeg jobber i baren i helgene.
translations.id: Saya bekerja di bar pada akhir pekan.
translations.sv: Jag jobbar i baren på helgerna.
translations.da: Jeg arbejder i baren i weekenden.
translations.ja: 週末はバーで働いています。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular.
Preposition ‘à’ contracted with ‘le’ (‘au’); introduces the locative complement.
Common masculine noun; object of the preposition ‘à’ indicating workplace.
Definite article, masculine singular; determines ‘week-end’.
Borrowed common noun; temporal NP with ‘le’ expressing habitual time (‘on weekends’).

sentences.target: Tu préfères ce bar ou la terrasse.
sentences.reading: /ty pʁefɛʁ sə baʁ u la teʁas/

translations.fr: Tu préfères ce bar ou la terrasse.
translations.ipa: /ty pʁefɛʁ sə baʁ u la teʁas/
translations.en: Do you prefer this bar or the terrace?
translations.de: Bevorzugst du diese Bar oder die Terrasse?
translations.it: Preferisci questo bar o la terrazza?
translations.ko: 이 바가 좋아요, 아니면 테라스가 좋아요?
translations.zh-Hans: 你更喜欢这家酒吧还是露台？
translations.yue: 你鍾意呢間酒吧定係露台？
translations.ru: Ты предпочитаешь этот бар или террасу?
translations.pt: Você prefere este bar ou a esplanada?
translations.he: אתה מעדיף את הבר הזה או את המרפסת?
translations.tr: Bu barı mı yoksa terası mı tercih ediyorsun?
translations.vi: Bạn thích quán bar này hay sân hiên?
translations.ar: هل تفضّل هذا البار أم الشرفة؟
translations.nl: Geef je de voorkeur aan deze bar of het terras?
translations.uk: Ти віддаєш перевагу цьому бару чи терасі?
translations.hu: Ezt a bárt vagy a teraszt kedveled jobban?
translations.hi: तुम इस बार को पसंद करते हो या टैरेस को?
translations.el: Προτιμάς αυτό το μπαρ ή τη βεράντα;
translations.nb: Foretrekker du denne baren eller terrassen?
translations.id: Kamu lebih suka bar ini atau teras?
translations.sv: Föredrar du den här baren eller terrassen?
translations.da: Foretrækker du denne bar eller terrassen?
translations.fi: Pidätkö enemmän tästä baarista vai terassista?
translations.ja: このバーとテラスのどちらが好きですか。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular.
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; takes a direct object.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies ‘bar’.
Common masculine noun; direct object option of ‘préférer’.
Coordinating conjunction linking two noun phrases (‘ce bar’ vs ‘la terrasse’).
Definite article, feminine singular; determines ‘terrasse’.
Common feminine noun; second coordinated option.

sentences.target: Ils prennent un bar grillé à midi.
sentences.reading: /il pʁɛn œ̃ baʁ gʁije a midi/

translations.fr: Ils prennent un bar grillé à midi.
translations.ipa: /il pʁɛn œ̃ baʁ gʁije a midi/
translations.en: They’re having grilled sea bass at noon.
translations.es: Van a comer lubina a la parrilla a mediodía.
translations.it: A mezzogiorno prendono la spigola alla griglia.
translations.ru: Они едят жареного сибаса в полдень.
translations.pt: Eles vão comer robalo grelhado ao meio-dia.
translations.vi: Họ ăn cá vược nướng vào buổi trưa.
translations.nl: Ze eten om twaalf uur gegrilde zeebaars.
translations.hi: वे दोपहर में ग्रिल्ड सी बास खा रहे हैं।
translations.pl: W południe jedzą grillowanego okonia morskiego.
translations.el: Το μεσημέρι τρώνε λαβράκι στη σχάρα.
translations.nb: De spiser grillet havabbor klokken tolv.
translations.id: Mereka makan kakap putih panggang saat tengah hari.
translations.sv: De äter grillad havsabborre klockan tolv.
translations.ro: La prânz mănâncă biban de mare la grătar.
translations.cs: V poledne jedí grilovaného mořského okouna.
translations.da: De spiser grillet havbars klokken tolv.
translations.ja: 彼らは正午にスズキのグリルを食べます。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 3rd person plural (masculine or mixed group).
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person plural; common with food meaning ‘to have’.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determines ‘bar’.
Common masculine noun; here denotes the fish ‘sea bass’, direct object of ‘prennent’.
Past participle used adjectivally; agrees masculine singular with ‘bar’, indicating preparation.
Preposition introducing a temporal complement.
Common noun; time expression functioning as temporal complement (‘at noon’).
